title: Define default directory for certificates
body: The current certificate work does not have a default directory.  Determine if one can/should be specified and then document it if so.

comments.body: @umohnani8 given https://github.com/containers/image/pull/411 can we close this issue?
I think we may need some changes to doc/man pages in Buildah before closing though.
No not yet, I need to vendor in containers/image and update the docs.
